mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EVENT (NO, PUBLIC_DATA_EVENT_NO, USER_ACCOUNT_NO, PRICE, RATING, SUB_DATE) VALUES (SEQ_EVENT.NEXTVAL, #{publicDataEventNo}, #{userAccountNo}, #{price}, #{rating}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USER_MANAGEMENT_EVENT A LEFT JOIN PUBLIC_DATA_EVENT B ON A.PUBLIC_DATA_EVENT_NO = B.NO WHERE A.USER_ACCOUNT_NO=#{no}
